title: Contact us — Pesticides Information Service — Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Pesticides Information Service
The Pesticides Regulatory Directorate does not provide medical advice. If you need immediate medical attention, call 911.
If you're experiencing symptoms, consult the instructions on the product label and contact your health care provider or a Poison Control Centre. When seeking medical attention, bring the pesticide container with you (including the product name and label).
The Pesticides Information Service (InfoServ) provides responses to public inquiries on pest control products (pesticides) and their regulation in Canada. InfoServ is part of Health Canada's Pesticides Regulatory Directorate (PRD), which is responsible for pesticide regulation in Canada.
You can contact InfoServ by email, telephone (toll-free), and through an online Public Engagement Portal (see details on this page).
Hours of operation are 7 am to 5 pm ET, Monday to Friday (excluding public statutory holidays).
E-mail: pesticides-info@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone: 613-996-9231 Toll-free: 1-800-267-6315 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Mail: Pesticides Information Service Pesticides Regulatory Directorate Health Canada 2 Constellation Drive Ottawa, Ontario Address Locator: 2608A K1A 0K9
Public Engagement Portal: Information Services Inquiry
Responses are typically provided within 10 business days. If more time is required to respond to an inquiry (for example, due to the complexity of the subject), InfoServ will inform you of the expected delay.

## For more information
You can find more information on the Pesticides in Canada page.
You can also visit the Pesticides and Pest Management section to learn about the regulation of pesticides by the PRD, such as :
- The Electronic Pesticide Regulatory System (e-PRS)
- Importing Pest Control Products
- Report a Pesticide Incident
More information about the Pesticides Regulatory Directorate is also available in the About Health Canada section.
